heading: Gratuity payment to persons discharged for fraudulent enlistment
label: 1048 Gratuity payment to persons discharged for fraudulent enlistment
text: The Secretary concerned may pay a gratuity of not to exceed $25 to a person discharged for fraudulent enlistment.
